raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a multilingual, scalable Transformer decoder model with enhanced data quality (15T tokens, improved preprocessing), optimized for multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool usage. Leverages advanced post-training techniques like SFT, DPO, and iterative refinement
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, multilingual support, coding assistance, reasoning, and basic tool usage
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, high-quality multilingual and multimodal foundation models with broad applicability
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning (SFT + DPO), alignment for multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool use

raw_extraction.innovation: Scalability improvements through massive pre-training (3.8×10²⁵ FLOPs, 15.6T tokens) and refined post-training alignment. Enhanced context window support and superior generalization across multilingual tasks
raw_extraction.application: Advanced reasoning, multilingual support, coding, and robust tool integration
raw_extraction.research_problem: High-performance multilingual and specialized capability foundation models
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning (SFT + DPO), alignment for multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool use

raw_extraction.innovation: Flagship model with 405B parameters and 128K context window, achieving state-of-the-art performance comparable to GPT-4 across diverse tasks. Enables advanced reasoning, multilingual support, and tool utilization through iterative alignment and multimodal compositional approaches
raw_extraction.application: Complex reasoning, multilingual support, coding, advanced tool integration, and general-purpose AI assistance
raw_extraction.research_problem: State-of-the-art multilingual and multimodal foundation model capabilities
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning (SFT + DPO), alignment for multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool use
raw_extraction.extension: Included Llama Guard integration for system-level safety filtering to reduce false refusal rates while maintaining safety standards

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces Llama 3 with advanced data curation (knowledge classification + scaling law experiments), grouped query attention (GQA), inter-document attention masking, and a 128K-token vocabulary optimized for multilingual support. Performance gains stem from improved data quality, diversity, and compute optimization
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (50% general knowledge, 25% math/reasoning, 17% code, 8% multilingual)
raw_extraction.application: General language tasks, chat applications, instruction following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Large-scale language model pre-training with enhanced data quality and computational efficiency
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Continued pre-training with annealing on high-quality code/mathematical data (GSM8K, MATH) for specialized reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Meta’s Grand Teton AI Server platform with up to 16K H100 GPUs (80GB HBM3, 700W TDP) using NVLink interconnects

raw_extraction.innovation: Same core innovations as Llama 3 Base plus increased model capacity for stronger in-context learning and reasoning capabilities. Demonstrated robustness against annealing for specialized tasks due to inherent in-context learning strengths
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (same composition as Llama 3 Base)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced reasoning, complex instruction following, multi-domain language tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Large-scale language model pre-training with enhanced computational efficiency and performance scaling

raw_extraction.innovation: Flagship model with compute-optimized architecture (126 layers, 16,384-dimension token representations) achieving ~38-43% BF16 MFU on 16K H100 GPUs. Demonstrates strong in-context learning and generalization without specialized fine-tuning due to extensive data diversity and quality improvements
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (same composition as Llama 3 Base)
raw_extraction.application: High-capacity reasoning, complex multi-turn dialogue systems, specialized domain expertise
raw_extraction.research_problem: Optimal scaling of large language models within compute constraints
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) + Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) for instruction tuning
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Meta’s Grand Teton AI Server platform with up to 16K H100 GPUs (80GB HBM3, 700W TDP) using RoCE fabric with Arista 7800 switches and Minipack2 OCP rack switches

raw_extraction.innovation: Llama 3 introduces a refined alignment pipeline leveraging iterative rounds of human preference data collection, advanced rejection-sampling with Paged Attention, and extensive post-training on diverse capabilities (general English, coding, multilingual, reasoning, long context). The model incorporates execution feedback for synthetic code generation and multi-stage quality filtering
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, instruction following, coding assistance, multilingual support, reasoning, long-context dialogue, and specialized capabilities like tool use and factual accuracy
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhanced large language model alignment and specialization across diverse domains
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) with rejection-sampling, iterative rounds, and advanced data processing

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced a vision module attached to Llama 3 for multimodal understanding, including image, chart, and document comprehension, achieved through specialized finetuning techniques like SFT, DPO, and rejection sampling
raw_extraction.application: Image understanding, document analysis, chart interpretation, multimodal reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Multimodal language understanding (image, document, chart reasoning)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), Rejection Sampling

raw_extraction.innovation: Enhanced multimodal capabilities with a vision module for interpreting images, charts, and documents, leveraging advanced finetuning methods like DPO with EMA updates and rejection sampling for improved reasoning
raw_extraction.application: Complex image understanding, scientific diagram parsing, document OCR, multimodal question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Advanced multimodal reasoning and visual-language alignment

raw_extraction.innovation: State-of-the-art vision module for Llama 3, achieving superior performance on multimodal benchmarks like MMMU and AI2Diagram, through specialized finetuning and preference optimization techniques
raw_extraction.application: Scientific reasoning, document analysis, complex image understanding, multimodal problem-solving
raw_extraction.research_problem: High-capacity multimodal reasoning and visual-language comprehension

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a series of large-scale language models leveraging advanced pretraining techniques and improved architecture for enhanced performance across various language tasks
raw_extraction.application: Chat, instruction following, general language tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling large language models for improved generalization and efficiency

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a series of large-scale language models leveraging advanced pretraining techniques and improved architecture for enhanced performance across various language tasks, including a significantly larger 70B parameter variant
raw_extraction.application: Advanced reasoning, complex instruction following, specialized language tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling large language models for improved generalization and efficiency

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a series of large-scale language models leveraging advanced pretraining techniques and improved architecture for enhanced performance across various language tasks, featuring the largest variant at 405B parameters for maximum capability
raw_extraction.application: High-capacity reasoning, advanced multi-tasking, specialized domain expertise
raw_extraction.research_problem: Extreme-scale language model development for cutting-edge applications
